payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards via `/brain admin sql`. No memory was deleted and no durable memory was created from this command.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a user memory fact to store.

details: DELETE FROM memory_cards was not executed.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin account or approved administrative interface for maintenance tasks.
If the goal is to delete your own saved memory, request deletion through the supported user memory deletion flow rather than raw SQL.
